Scenario.Name: llm_generated evidence is rejected
Scenario.Expected: Any source with source_origin=llm_generated must have source_authority=forbidden and must not be used as matching evidence.

Scenario.Name: user_decision cannot validate normative fields
Scenario.Expected: User decisions may validate project-only entities but cannot validate GESN code, norm unit, included works, excluded works, resource composition, coefficients, FSNB version, or technical part references.

Scenario.Name: rule with missing GESN evidence cannot be active
Scenario.Expected: Validation fails if a matching rule has status=active and missing GESN or other required evidence.

Scenario.Name: file in inbox is not trusted until accepted into raw with checksum
Scenario.Expected: Files in data/reference/inbox are not trusted evidence until accepted into raw with checksum_sha256 and manifest metadata.

Scenario.Name: importing identical records across releases does not create duplicate revisions
Scenario.Expected: Records with identical canonical payload hashes reuse previous revisions.

Scenario.Name: changing one reference record creates one new object revision and one change_set entry
Scenario.Expected: A changed canonical payload creates exactly one new revision and one change_set entry for that logical object.

Scenario.Name: deleted reference record creates delete operation
Scenario.Expected: A record absent from the next release creates a delete operation and deleted change type.

Scenario.Name: matching rule depending on changed normative object is marked requires_norm_review
Scenario.Expected: When a depended normative reference object changes, the matching rule is marked requires_norm_review before reactivation.

Scenario.Name: all artifact registry paths exist
Scenario.Expected: All path values in docs/artifact-registry.yml exist unless artifact status is planned or blocked.

Scenario.Name: expected artifacts are registered
Scenario.Expected: Each ExpectedArtifacts entry in execution-packets.xml is registered in docs/artifact-registry.yml or represented as planned/blocked.

Scenario.Name: accepted packet has acceptance report
Scenario.Expected: Any accepted packet must have docs/acceptance/PACKET_ID.acceptance.md.

Scenario.Name: accepted_by cannot be Codex
Scenario.Expected: Acceptance metadata rejects accepted_by=Codex.

Scenario.Name: packet cannot be accepted without acceptance_decision accepted
Scenario.Expected: Accepted packet status requires acceptance_decision=accepted in the acceptance report.

Scenario.Name: ready_for_acceptance packet has acceptance criteria
Scenario.Expected: Execution packet with status ready_for_acceptance contains AcceptanceCriteria.

Scenario.Name: project plan links current acceptance report
Scenario.Expected: docs/project-plan.md contains a valid local link to the current packet acceptance report.

Scenario.Name: artifact registry contains acceptance blocks
Scenario.Expected: Artifacts requiring acceptance have acceptance metadata and existing acceptance reports.

Scenario.Name: acceptance-dashboard.md exists
Scenario.Expected: docs/acceptance-dashboard.md exists.

Scenario.Name: acceptance-dashboard.yml exists
Scenario.Expected: docs/acceptance-dashboard.yml exists.

Scenario.Name: ready packets are listed in acceptance dashboard
Scenario.Expected: All ready_for_acceptance packets are listed in docs/acceptance-dashboard.yml.

Scenario.Name: accepted_by and decided_by cannot be Codex
Scenario.Expected: Acceptance and dashboard metadata reject accepted_by=Codex and decided_by=Codex.

Scenario.Name: user-action-dashboard.md exists
Scenario.Expected: docs/user-action-dashboard.md exists.

Scenario.Name: user-action-dashboard.yml exists
Scenario.Expected: docs/user-action-dashboard.yml exists.

Scenario.Name: open questions are listed in user action dashboard
Scenario.Expected: All open questions are listed in docs/user-action-dashboard.yml.

Scenario.Name: high priority questions are visible
Scenario.Expected: High priority questions are visible in docs/user-action-dashboard.md.

Scenario.Name: accepted artifacts are marked protected
Scenario.Expected: Accepted artifacts are marked protected in registry and dashboards.

Scenario.Name: protected artifacts require user approval
Scenario.Expected: Protected accepted artifacts cannot be changed without explicit user approval.

Scenario.Name: accepted artifact modification requires action
Scenario.Expected: Change request or requires_user_approval action is required for accepted artifact modification.

Scenario.Name: verification-dashboard.md exists
Scenario.Expected: docs/verification-dashboard.md exists.

Scenario.Name: verification-dashboard.yml exists
Scenario.Expected: docs/verification-dashboard.yml exists.

Scenario.Name: manual checks cannot be marked passed by Codex
Scenario.Expected: Manual checks must not be marked checked or passed with checked_by=Codex.

Scenario.Name: checked_by cannot be Codex
Scenario.Expected: Verification dashboard rejects checked_by=Codex.

Scenario.Name: each check has how_to_check
Scenario.Expected: Every verification dashboard check has a how_to_check instruction list.

Scenario.Name: each check has expected_result
Scenario.Expected: Every verification dashboard check has an expected_result list.

Scenario.Name: dashboard includes checks from monthly test protocol
Scenario.Expected: All VT-* check identifiers from the monthly test protocol are present in docs/verification-dashboard.yml.

Scenario.Name: dashboard links checks to artifacts and commands
Scenario.Expected: Verification dashboard checks link to relevant artifact paths and command checks where applicable.

Scenario.Name: required dissertation sync files exist
Scenario.Expected: All mandatory files and folders for docs/dissertation/ and thesis/ placeholders exist.

Scenario.Name: forbidden GESN auto selection claim is registered
Scenario.Expected: forbidden-claims.yml contains a prohibition against automatic GESN selection by BIM element.

Scenario.Name: generated prompts have YAML front matter
Scenario.Expected: Every generated prompt in prompt-queue has YAML front matter with prompt_id and status.

Scenario.Name: docx_update prompt requires accepted patch
Scenario.Expected: Prompt validation rejects docx_update prompts without a reference to an accepted markdown patch.

Scenario.Name: prompts do not contain forbidden claims
Scenario.Expected: Prompt validation rejects generated prompts that contain forbidden claims as assertions.

Scenario.Name: dissertation update cannot be accepted by Codex
Scenario.Expected: Validation rejects prompts, queue entries, and acceptance metadata with accepted_by=Codex.

Scenario.Name: AGENTS forbids direct DOCX editing
Scenario.Expected: AGENTS.md forbids direct DOCX editing without explicit user request.

Scenario.Name: accepted artifacts are protected
Scenario.Expected: Accepted artifacts require user approval before material changes.

Scenario.Name: EP-008 appears in acceptance dashboard
Scenario.Expected: EP-008-DISSERTATION-PROMPT-GENERATION is listed in docs/acceptance-dashboard.yml.

Scenario.Name: EP-008 appears in verification dashboard
Scenario.Expected: EP-008 verification checks are listed in docs/verification-dashboard.yml.

Scenario.Name: audit directory exists
Scenario.Expected: docs/audit/ exists with README, audit reports, language policy, audit profile, and audit-findings.yml.

Scenario.Name: codex spec audit script exists
Scenario.Expected: scripts/audit_codex_spec.py exists and updates docs/audit/codex-spec-audit.md and audit-findings.yml.

Scenario.Name: language audit script exists
Scenario.Expected: scripts/audit_language_policy.py exists and updates docs/audit/language-audit-report.md and audit-findings.yml.

Scenario.Name: AGENTS.md contains Language policy
Scenario.Expected: AGENTS.md contains a Language policy section.

Scenario.Name: AGENTS.md contains Audit discipline
Scenario.Expected: AGENTS.md contains an Audit discipline section.

Scenario.Name: duplicate packet ids are detected
Scenario.Expected: audit_codex_spec.py creates a critical finding for duplicate execution packet ids.

Scenario.Name: direct ModelElement to GESNNorm mapping is critical
Scenario.Expected: audit_codex_spec.py treats absence of the forbidden ModelElement -> GESNNorm guardrail as critical.

Scenario.Name: Codex cannot own user decision fields
Scenario.Expected: accepted_by, decided_by, checked_by, and answered_by must not equal Codex.

Scenario.Name: language audit ignores code blocks and technical identifiers
Scenario.Expected: audit_language_policy.py ignores code blocks, inline code, file paths, commands, URLs, enum statuses, and technical identifiers.

Scenario.Name: user-facing English creates language finding
Scenario.Expected: User-facing English text creates AUD-LANG-001 medium or low finding instead of automatic translation.

Scenario.Name: audit scripts preserve finding statuses and resolutions
Scenario.Expected: Existing acknowledged, fixed, accepted_risk, false_positive, blocked, or requires_user_approval statuses are not reset to open by audit scripts.

Scenario.Name: medium and low language findings do not fail make check
Scenario.Expected: Medium/low AUD-LANG-001 findings are recorded but do not fail make check.

Scenario.Name: accepted protected artifacts are not modified by EP-009
Scenario.Expected: EP-009 creates findings or requires_user_approval actions instead of changing accepted/protected artifacts.

Scenario.Name: audit does not auto-close findings as fixed
Scenario.Expected: Audit scripts do not mark findings fixed without actual correction and non-Codex evidence.

Scenario.Name: EP-009 performs no mass rewrite
Scenario.Expected: EP-009 adds audit contour artifacts and small guardrails, but does not mass-rewrite existing documents.

Scenario.Name: Git workflow document exists
Scenario.Expected: docs/git-workflow.md exists and describes branch, merge, dirty tree, forbidden file, and mixed EP rules.

Scenario.Name: AGENTS.md contains Git workflow discipline
Scenario.Expected: AGENTS.md contains a Git workflow discipline section.

Scenario.Name: validate_git_workflow.py exists
Scenario.Expected: scripts/validate_git_workflow.py exists and supports advisory and strict modes.

Scenario.Name: branch naming policy is defined
Scenario.Expected: Branch names follow ep-<number>-<short-slug> unless a documented exception exists.

Scenario.Name: merge requires accepted packet
Scenario.Expected: Merge is forbidden unless acceptance_decision=accepted, accepted_by is set, and user approval exists.

Scenario.Name: accepted_by = Codex is forbidden
Scenario.Expected: Git workflow validation rejects accepted_by=Codex.

Scenario.Name: forbidden files are detected
Scenario.Expected: Git workflow validation detects .env, .venv, node_modules, dumps, real DOCX/PDF dissertation files, and other forbidden staged/untracked files.

Scenario.Name: script does not perform merge, add, or commit
Scenario.Expected: validate_git_workflow.py inspects Git state but does not run merge, add, commit, push, or branch deletion commands.

Scenario.Name: user-review-workbench.yml exists
Scenario.Expected: docs/user-review-workbench.yml exists and is generated from source files.

Scenario.Name: user-review-workbench.md exists
Scenario.Expected: docs/user-review-workbench.md exists and provides one active user review window.

Scenario.Name: accepted packets are hidden from active_review_items
Scenario.Expected: Accepted packets are absent from active_review_items and appear only in recently_accepted.

Scenario.Name: ready_for_acceptance packets are present in active_review_items
Scenario.Expected: All non-accepted ready_for_acceptance packets from acceptance-dashboard.yml are active review items.

Scenario.Name: source_file and source_checksum_sha256 are present
Scenario.Expected: Every active review item has source_file and source_checksum_sha256 or a documented warning.

Scenario.Name: apply_user_review_decisions refuses accepted_by = Codex
Scenario.Expected: Decision application rejects accepted_by=Codex.

Scenario.Name: apply_user_review_decisions refuses stale source checksums
Scenario.Expected: Decision application refuses to update an acceptance report when source_checksum_sha256 is stale.

Scenario.Name: pseudo blockers and risks are rejected
Scenario.Expected: Workbench validation rejects pseudo values such as Блокеров нет, Рисков нет, Отсутствуют, None, No blockers, and No risks in active blockers or risks.

Scenario.Name: acceptance reports remain source of truth
Scenario.Expected: Workbench decisions are not source of truth until scripts/apply_user_review_decisions.py writes them to acceptance reports.

Scenario.Name: EP-010 was not executed
Scenario.Expected: README.md and CHANGELOG.md language normalization is not performed by EP-012.

Scenario.Name: accepted reports are reflected in execution packets
Scenario.Expected: Every acceptance report with acceptance_decision=accepted and non-empty accepted_by has accepted status in docs/grace/execution-packets.xml.

Scenario.Name: accepted baseline is visible in planning documents
Scenario.Expected: docs/project-state.yml, docs/project-plan.md, and docs/status-report.md contain the current state_mode, active_execution_packet, last accepted packet, and next recommended packet.

Scenario.Name: accepted packets are not active acceptance items
Scenario.Expected: EP-001 through EP-012 do not appear as active acceptance items in docs/user-review-workbench.yml.

Scenario.Name: project-state controls current ready packet
Scenario.Expected: The active ready_for_acceptance packet is read from docs/project-state.yml and appears in dashboards and workbench until user acceptance.

Scenario.Name: verification checks stay open
Scenario.Expected: EP-013 does not close pending verification checks or mark manual checks passed by Codex.

Scenario.Name: user actions stay open
Scenario.Expected: High-priority reference and normative user actions remain open until the user provides evidence.

Scenario.Name: audit statuses are not changed
Scenario.Expected: EP-013 does not mass-close audit findings or introduce audit cleanup statuses.

Scenario.Name: EP-006 monthly scope is not an execution packet
Scenario.Expected: EP-006-MONTHLY-PLANNING-AND-DEFENSE monthly checks are represented as MONTHLY-2026-06 monthly scope checks, not as an accepted or active execution packet.

Scenario.Name: accepted artifact protection is deferred
Scenario.Expected: protected_accepted_artifacts=0 remains visible and accepted artifact protection classification is deferred after EP-014-USER-REVIEW-DECISION-CLI-SAFETY to the next free planned protection packet.

Scenario.Name: dry-run mode is non-writing
Scenario.Expected: python3 scripts/apply_user_review_decisions.py --dry-run exits successfully and does not change git status --short.

Scenario.Name: apply mode is explicit
Scenario.Expected: scripts/apply_user_review_decisions.py exposes --apply, and files are modified only in --apply mode after all safety checks pass.

Scenario.Name: user-owned fields are required
Scenario.Expected: Apply rejects empty accepted_by, accepted_at, comments, accepted_by=Codex, and non-accepted decisions.

Scenario.Name: stale checksum blocks apply
Scenario.Expected: Apply refuses to update target_decision_file when source_checksum_sha256 does not match the current file.

Scenario.Name: already accepted reports are protected
Scenario.Expected: Apply refuses to overwrite an already accepted report without explicit user approval.

Scenario.Name: post-acceptance validator allows only registered current ready packet
Scenario.Expected: validate_post_acceptance_state.py allows EP-014-USER-REVIEW-DECISION-CLI-SAFETY as the only ready_for_acceptance packet after EP-013 acceptance and rejects any other active acceptance item.

Scenario.Name: generated workbench requires dry-run before apply
Scenario.Expected: docs/user-review-workbench.md and docs/user-review-workbench.yml require make apply-user-review-decisions-dry-run before make apply-user-review-decisions and document affected files, acceptance report, and user-owned field checks.

Scenario.Name: accepted artifact protection label uses EP-018
Scenario.Expected: Generated acceptance and workbench artifacts use EP-018-ACCEPTED-ARTIFACT-PROTECTION for accepted artifact protection debt instead of the legacy EP-014 deferral label.

Scenario.Name: approved CR gate проверен
Scenario.Expected: README.md и CHANGELOG.md изменяются в EP-010 только после approved CR-EP-010-README-CHANGELOG-LANGUAGE-NORMALIZATION с approved_by не Codex.

Scenario.Name: нормализация README
Scenario.Expected: Пользовательские англоязычные фрагменты README.md переведены на русский язык, а команды, пути, enum-статусы и кодовые блоки сохранены.

Scenario.Name: нормализация CHANGELOG
Scenario.Expected: Пользовательские англоязычные фрагменты CHANGELOG.md переведены на русский язык, а technical identifiers сохранены.

Scenario.Name: language audit обновлен
Scenario.Expected: AUD-LANG-001 findings по README.md и CHANGELOG.md обновлены через make audit-language, остальные findings не закрыты без исправления или обоснованного false_positive.

Scenario.Name: EP-010 не принят автоматически
Scenario.Expected: EP-010-LANGUAGE-NORMALIZATION остается ready_for_acceptance; acceptance_decision остается pending до пользовательской приемки.

Scenario.Name: project-state.yml exists and is complete
Scenario.Expected: docs/project-state.yml exists and contains schema_version, state_mode, active_execution_packet, last_accepted_execution_packet, last_completed_execution_packet, next_recommended_packet, accepted_packets, and monthly_scopes.

Scenario.Name: post-acceptance validator reads project-state
Scenario.Expected: scripts/validate_post_acceptance_state.py validates accepted packets and active packet state from docs/project-state.yml instead of hardcoded current packet constants.

Scenario.Name: audit reads active packet from project-state
Scenario.Expected: scripts/audit_codex_spec.py determines active_execution_packet and next_recommended_packet from docs/project-state.yml instead of arbitrary Markdown regex matching.

Scenario.Name: monthly checks use monthly scope
Scenario.Expected: Verification dashboard checks formerly associated with EP-006 use scope_type=monthly_block and scope_id=MONTHLY-2026-06 without related_packet=EP-006-MONTHLY-PLANNING-AND-DEFENSE.

Scenario.Name: make verify is read-only
Scenario.Expected: make verify runs validation commands without regenerating dashboards, audit files, or other snapshots and does not change git status --short.

Scenario.Name: make check remains compatible
Scenario.Expected: make check keeps the existing workflow including generation and audit targets, while make verify is the preferred read-only verification entrypoint.

Scenario.Name: stale findings are historical only
Scenario.Expected: Findings with current_detected=false remain in docs/audit/audit-findings.yml but are not included in active review/action windows or active blocker counts.

Scenario.Name: audit finding groups are generated
Scenario.Expected: Generated audit/workbench/action artifacts include deterministic audit_finding_groups with total, current, historical and active_blocking counts.

Scenario.Name: workbench markdown is compact
Scenario.Expected: docs/user-review-workbench.md shows no more than 20 active critical/high audit findings and no more than 10 grouped historical finding groups.

Scenario.Name: user action dashboard hides stale audit actions
Scenario.Expected: docs/user-action-dashboard.yml excludes current_detected=false audit findings from urgent/open user actions while preserving real user actions and current findings.

Scenario.Name: audit report separates active and historical findings
Scenario.Expected: docs/audit/codex-spec-audit.md reports current findings separately from historical/stale finding groups and counts active critical findings only from current findings.

Scenario.Name: workbench validator rejects stale active findings
Scenario.Expected: scripts/validate_user_review_workbench.py fails if current_detected=false appears in active_review_items or if grouped historical counts are inconsistent.

Scenario.Name: audit statuses are preserved
Scenario.Expected: EP-017 does not delete findings, does not mark stale findings fixed, and does not set resolved_by=Codex.

Scenario.Name: make verify remains read-only after EP-017
Scenario.Expected: make verify does not change git status --short after EP-017 generator and dashboard updates.

Scenario.Name: accepted acceptance reports are protected
Scenario.Expected: Every acceptance report with acceptance_decision=accepted is registered in docs/artifact-registry.yml with protection_status=protected.

Scenario.Name: generated dashboards are not hard-locked
Scenario.Expected: Generated dashboards, workbench files, and generated audit reports are classified as not_protected_generated and declare generator, derived_from, and regeneration_command.

Scenario.Name: protected artifacts require user approval
Scenario.Expected: Protected artifacts have change_requires_user_approval=true and cannot be changed without an approved protected artifact change request.

Scenario.Name: change request registry exists
Scenario.Expected: docs/protected-artifact-change-requests.yml exists with schema_version=1 and allowed request statuses.

Scenario.Name: protection validator is connected to make check
Scenario.Expected: make validate-accepted-artifact-protection runs scripts/validate_accepted_artifact_protection.py and make check includes that target.

Scenario.Name: EP-010 cannot change protected accepted artifacts
Scenario.Expected: Validation fails if EP-010-LANGUAGE-NORMALIZATION targets a protected accepted artifact without an approved change request.

Scenario.Name: accepted reports remain unchanged during EP-018
Scenario.Expected: git diff for accepted reports EP-001 through EP-014 is empty after EP-018 implementation.

Scenario.Name: user-owned fields are not changed by Codex
Scenario.Expected: acceptance_decision, accepted_by, accepted_at, comments, checked_by, answered_by, and decided_by are not set to Codex or silently modified by EP-018.
